definitions: A unit of magnetic flux density in the International System of Units (SI), equal to one weber per square meter.
An electric car manufacturer known for its electric vehicles, battery energy storage, solar panels, and related products.

Nikola Tesla, a Serbian-American inventor, electrical engineer, mechanical engineer, and futurist best known for his contributions to the design of the modern alternating current (AC) electricity supply system.
examples: The magnetic field strength was measured in Tesla.
Nikola Tesla was a brilliant inventor.
